session_log.notes: First heartbeat run. 2 P0 discrepancies: stale Yelp listing and Connect Savannah listing both pointing to old Congress St address. 2 P1 name discrepancies: Martindale and lawyers.com still show old entity name. 1 P2 missing BBB listing. Local pack visibility: absent from top 10 organic for all 3 target queries — baseline established. Avvo, FindLaw, Justia returned 403 on direct fetch; NAP appears correct from search snippets.

Verification heartbeat. Confirmed all 4 open Savannah NAP issues still active. ROD-17 (Yelp stale): confirmed active, Updated Dec 2025, 7 E Congress St. ROD-18 (Connect Savannah): confirmed active, old name/address, 'Update This Location' public link available. ROD-19 (Martindale): confirmed active, name shows 'Roden Love LLC', address correct. ROD-21 (lawyers.com): confirmed in search results as 'Roden + Love, LLC'. New additional findings: HG.org and Attorney Yellow Pages both show old entity name — logged as new P2 discrepancies. All 4 tasks blocked pending SEO Strategist platform access.

Darien full audit. Canonical NAP: 1108 North Way, Darien, GA 31305, (912) 303-5850. Key findings: (1) Martindale shows 'Roden Love LLC' — P1 name discrepancy, same pattern as Savannah. Address/phone/website correct. (2) McIntosh Chamber listing shows wrong address: 13 St. Andrews Ct., Brunswick, GA 31520 — P0. (3) No Darien GBP confirmed indexed in Google Maps — potential missing GBP, P0. (4) No Darien Yelp listing — P2. (5) No Darien BBB listing — P2. (6) MAJOR: Brunswick office at 13 St. Andrews Ct., Brunswick GA 31520 appears across 6+ directories (LawInfo, FindLaw-Brunswick, Town Planner, Yelp-Brunswick, ReachAttorneys) and on rodenlaw.com practice area pages. This 6th office is NOT in canonical firm-data.php. Needs immediate clarification from Founding Engineer. Issue IDs to be updated once created.

Charleston audit. Overall NAP health is good — no P0 or P1 discrepancies. BBB, LawInfo, GBP, Yelp, FindLaw all show correct 127 King St NAP. Missing: Martindale (no Charleston org page, only Savannah/Darien); Avvo and Super Lawyers firm listings unconfirmed. GBP confirmed active (67 reviews, 5 stars). Local pack: not visible for any of 3 queries but GBP exists — competition issue not citation. Issue IDs to be updated after creation.

Columbia audit. COLD START — near-zero citation footprint. No GBP, no Yelp, no BBB, no Martindale, no LawInfo, no FindLaw Columbia listing found. Address 1545 Sumter St., Suite B not appearing in any directory searches. Local pack: completely absent for all 3 target queries. This is the weakest local SEO profile of all 5 offices. Priority: GBP creation is blocking all other local pack progress. Issue IDs to be updated after creation.

Myrtle Beach (Murrells Inlet) audit. COLD START — zero citation footprint. No GBP, no Yelp, no BBB, no Martindale, no LawInfo, no FindLaw. No local pack presence. Key risk: office is physically in Murrells Inlet, SC 29576 but marketed as Myrtle Beach — any directory submission must use Murrells Inlet as city. Issue IDs to be updated after creation.

directories.notes: Verified 2026-03-20: listing still active under old entity name. Address and phone are correct. Fix requires Martindale firm account login. Note: lawyers.com (ROD-21) is a Martindale property — may auto-update when this is corrected.

directories.notes: 403 on direct fetch. Multiple search queries confirm address 333 Commercial Dr. and phone (912) 303-5850. Firm name appears as Roden Law.

directories.notes: Minor P3: shows 'Commercial Drive' instead of 'Commercial Dr.' — below threshold for action.

directories.name: Yelp (current/correct)
directories.notes: 403 on direct fetch. Search snippet: RODEN LAW at 333 Commercial Dr, Savannah, Georgia. Updated June 2025. 58 reviews, 4.9 stars.

directories.name: Yelp (STALE DUPLICATE — action required)
directories.notes: Active duplicate listing with old name and old address. Last updated December 2025 — still live. Requires removal/merge.

directories.name: BBB
directories.notes: No Savannah listing found. BBB search for 'Roden Law' near Savannah, GA returns only the Charleston office (127 King St Ste 200, Charleston, SC 29401). Submission required at https://www.bbb.org/accreditation/apply. Action required by SEO Strategist — tracked in ROD-20.

submission_details.note: Consider applying for BBB accreditation alongside basic listing submission for added trust signal.

directories.name: Google Maps / GBP
directories.notes: GBP verified and active at 333 Commercial Dr, Savannah, GA 31406. 5-star average. Review count ~38-58 (varies by aggregator).

directories.name: Connect Savannah (STALE — action required)
directories.notes: Verified live on 2026-03-20. Shows old entity name, old vacated Congress St address, and old rodenlovelaw.com domain. 'Update This Location' public link available.

discrepancies.notes: Old domain discovered during 2026-03-20 verification. Fix alongside name/address.

directories.name: lawyers.com
directories.notes: Martindale-Hubbell property. Confirmed active in search results as 'Roden + Love, LLC'. Dependent on Martindale fix (ROD-19) — may auto-sync within 2-4 weeks of Martindale name update. If no auto-sync after that window, requires separate lawyers.com login to update display name. Blocked on ROD-19 resolution.

directories.name: HG.org
directories.notes: Found in search results showing old entity name. Direct fetch returned ECONNREFUSED. Confirmed via Google search snippet: listed as 'Roden + Love, LLC'. Severity P2 — name-only discrepancy, address not confirmed from snippet.

directories.name: Attorney Yellow Pages
directories.notes: Found in search results. Listed as 'Roden Love LLC'. Address and phone not confirmed. Low-authority directory but contributes to old-name citation footprint.

directories.name: Martindale
directories.notes: Listing active under old entity name. Address (1108 North Way, Darien, GA 31305), phone (912) 303-5850, and website (rodenlaw.com) are correct. Same root issue as Savannah ROD-19 — likely part of the same Martindale firm account.

directories.name: McIntosh County Chamber of Commerce
directories.notes: Chamber listing shows Brunswick address instead of Darien. Name and phone correct. Critical P0 — this is the local chamber for the Darien office and it points to a different city/address.

directories.name: Google Maps / GBP
directories.notes: No indexed Darien GBP found in Google Maps searches. Only Savannah CID (1808156815976375344) returned. Without a GBP, Roden Law has no local pack presence for Darien queries. Must verify directly in GBP dashboard — may exist but be unverified/suppressed.

discrepancies.canonical: Should exist for 1108 North Way, Darien, GA 31305
